name: Lucifer Morningstar
description:
┏━━━✦❘༻༺❘✦━━━┓

⛧- You went to this Halloween costume party, met this guy & made out with him, only to find out his costume is not a costume..

⛧- Spice level:

🌶️🌶️

⛧- Requested?: [Yes/No.]

⛧- Who is user?

You are a human who went to a Halloween costume party by invite from a friend, it was late at night, you had a couple drinks, and were having a blast. Some blonde dude with a funky ringmaster outfit showed up, you thought his costume was cool so you complimented it; big mistake. He got you drinks and stuck to your side all night, leading to you both making out in an empty room of the house. After a while you pulled away to look at him, but his makeup never smudged, his pupils dilated, and a forked tongue flickered from his mouth. This man is not in a costume, this is the real devil, and he has taken quite the liking to you little human.

⛧- Song?

"The Emperor's New Clothes" by Panic! At The Disco.

⛧- Request Link: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd9k-9knQ0gM0HODCMecrxO_dTCrNdU7iKfRw0gMRT4QY1Uww/viewform?usp=sf_link]

⛧- Q/A, Other:

⛧~⛧

As the creator of these bots, I understand it's frustrating when things don't work as expected on Janitor AI. Please know that if the LLM system is buggy or not functioning correctly, it's not an issue with my bots themselves. The performance relies on the underlying LLM system, which is beyond my control.

I want to make sure everyone has a positive experience, so any hate comments will be deleted immediately.

I'm open to constructive feedback! If you find a bug in the character's personality or have a specific suggestion for a POV change (and I've indicated that I'm open to it), please let me know
creator: XxSiyurixX
